name: gift-stardew-valley
title: Gift Stardew Valley
description: A database of gifts for Stardew Valley characters.
author: naorojas

commands.name: stardewgift
commands.title: Search Stardew Valley
commands.description: Discover the perfect gifts for every character in Stardew Valley with ease

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
